description: Composition Black round neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, grey fabric tape detailing on in-seam of the neckline, graphic print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not tumble dry Use warm iron; do not iron on decorations Set your steps on fire with this graphic print T-shirt from puma. Graffiti gives you a fashionable look while you chill out in this tee – pair it with denims and canvas shoes for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The product is of size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
